_meta.note: This is a cached sample output collected on 2026-06-11 using live API calls. Included per assessment instructions so evaluators can review the analysis even if live sources change.
_meta.trend_run: Earthy Tone Utility Co-ords, Cotton-linen, ₹699-999, Spring/Summer

input.description: Earthy-toned utility co-ord sets in breathable cotton-linen with cargo pocket details and relaxed silhouette, targeting casual-occasion summer buyers at value price points

creator.evidence_summary: 12 YouTube videos found (9 in last 6 months). Top: 'Myntra Summer Haul 2026 | Co-ord Sets Under ₹1000' — 284,000 views. 6 Instagram mentions via Google Search, most from May–June 2026.
creator.what_it_proves: Creators are picking up and amplifying this style, signaling awareness and early adoption among fashion-forward consumers.
creator.what_could_mislead: View counts do not equal purchase intent. Social buzz concentrated among premium/aspirational creators may not translate to value-fashion demand at ₹600-999.

youtube.title: Myntra Summer Haul 2026 | Co-ord Sets Under ₹1000
Earthy Tones Are Taking Over | Summer Co-ord Haul
Budget Utility Co-ords REVIEW ft. Zudio & Max

instagram.snippet: Cotton-linen coord set haul — olive and camel tones #coordsets2026

instagram.title: Utility coord set OOTD | Instagram Reels
instagram.snippet: Obsessed with this cargo pocket coord set under ₹800

marketplace.evidence_summary: Found 14 listings across Myntra, Amazon.in. Price range: ₹649, ₹799, ₹899. Total reviews: 2,340. Avg rating: 4.1. Multiple 'New Arrival' badges visible on Myntra search as of June 2026.
marketplace.what_it_proves: Products exist at the target price band and are commercially available; review volume indicates real purchase activity.
marketplace.what_could_mislead: Sponsored placement inflates visibility. Heavy discounting can signal overstocked inventory, not demand. Stockouts can look like high demand.

search_interest.evidence_summary: Google Trends confirms 'utility co-ord set' and 'cotton linen coord set' are recognized search topics in India. Related topics: linen coord set, cargo coord set women, summer coord set India. Full interest-over-time curve requires authenticated session — directional signal is positive.
search_interest.what_it_proves: Consumer search intent exists for this trend in India, indicating awareness beyond social media.
search_interest.what_could_mislead: Search interest is a lagging indicator — by the time searches peak, buying window may have passed. Regional spikes may not reflect your target customer geography.

competitor.evidence_summary: 9 listings found across Zudio, Max Fashion. 4 new arrivals detected. No heavy discounting detected — all full-price listings. Zudio leading with 5 SKUs; Max has 4.
competitor.what_it_proves: Value-fashion retailers are actively stocking this trend, indicating retailer conviction and reduced first-mover risk.
competitor.what_could_mislead: Retailers may be copying each other without independent demand validation. Zudio and Max serve slightly different segments than your retailer.

historical.evidence_summary: Closest analog: 'Earthy / Utility Cotton Co-ord Sets (cargo/utility pocket)' (2025) — Strong sell-through (est. 78%). Camel and olive led. Restocked in April. Also relevant: Floral Print Co-ord Sets (2023), Linen Co-ord Sets (2024). Data source: hand-curated dataset (see /data/historical-analogs.json).
historical.what_it_proves: Historical precedent suggests High India-fit. Key lesson: Most closely analogous to current 'Earthy Tone Utility Co-ords' trend. Strong precedent.
historical.what_could_mislead: Dataset is small (10 entries) and hand-curated — disclosed. Market conditions in 2026 may differ from 2025. Past sell-through does not guarantee future demand.

raw_data.trend: Earthy / Utility Cotton Co-ord Sets (cargo / utility pocket)
raw_data.silhouette: Relaxed shirt / short kurta + wide cargo trouser
raw_data.print: Solid (earth tones: camel, khaki, rust, olive)
raw_data.outcome: Strong sell-through (est. 78%). Camel and olive led. Restocked in April.
raw_data.what_worked: Multiple signal alignment: creator buzz + Myntra new arrivals + Zudio early stock. Earth tones are occasion-flexible. Comfort-forward.
raw_data.what_didnt: Rust and khaki slower in South India market.
raw_data.notes: Most closely analogous to current 'Earthy Tone Utility Co-ords' trend. Strong precedent.

disagreement_view: Four of five signals are aligned: Creator Pulse is high, Marketplace shows real purchase activity, Competitor Buy Map shows Zudio and Max have committed inventory, and Historical Analog offers a near-identical precedent with strong outcomes. The only friction is the Search Interest signal — Google Trends data is directionally positive but incomplete due to API session limitations, so we cannot confirm peak timing. The key unresolved question is: are we early in the search curve or at peak? If search interest is still rising, this is a strong buy window. If we are at peak, the optimal entry may have been 4–6 weeks ago. Resolve this by checking Google Trends directly (India, last 12 months, 'utility coord set') before committing.

india_fit.climate: Strong fit for Spring/Summer (March–June). Cotton-linen is heat-appropriate and breathable for India's pre-monsoon heat. Avoid stocking for South India monsoon months (July–September).
india_fit.modesty_norms: Good fit. Relaxed full-length silhouette with cargo trousers covers modesty requirements for most urban and semi-urban Indian buyers. Not a concern for this style.
india_fit.price_sensitivity: Well-positioned at ₹699–999 for value retail. This is the core commercial price band where repeat purchasing happens. Margin is workable if sourced in cotton-linen blend at scale.
india_fit.occasion_relevance: High. Earth tones in utility silhouette work across casual outings, brunches, travel, and semi-casual office — the multi-occasion use case drives repeat wear and lowers return risk.
india_fit.overall: Strong India value-fashion fit on all four dimensions. The silhouette, fabric, and price band all align with the target buyer profile.

suggested_units: 200–400 units (initial order). Skew 60% olive/camel, 40% khaki/rust. Prioritize Tier-1 and Tier-2 cities. Monitor South India sell-through separately.
evidence_gaps: Google Trends full curve not available — verify peak timing manually before order confirmation
No stockout data from Myntra — check if current listings are constrained by supply or slow demand
Rust and khaki performance in South India unknown — historical analog showed slower uptake there
Supplier lead time for cotton-linen not confirmed — verify 4–6 week delivery is achievable before this season's window closes
recommended_actions: Verify Google Trends India curve for 'utility coord set' — confirm search is still rising, not at peak
Request fabric swatches from 2–3 suppliers for cotton-linen blend at target price
Finalize size split: focus on S/M/L; limit XL+ to 15% of initial order based on historical analog
Set sell-through checkpoint at 4 weeks post-launch — reorder if above 50%, markdown if below 30%
caveats: Signal alignment is strong but this category is entering a saturation phase — Zudio and Max are both already stocked, so first-mover advantage is reduced
Earth tones have a defined seasonal window (March–July). Missing this window means holding inventory until next year
Historical analog (2025) is from the same category but market conditions in 2026 may differ — competitor saturation is higher now
Creator signal is concentrated in YouTube haul content, which skews toward Tier-1 urban buyers; verify if your store base matches this profile
